Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: RevealUI Studio
Message:
feat(cms): auth gate, billing integration, and admin bootstrap

- Add middleware auth gate protecting /admin routes (redirects to /login)
- Check both revealui-session and revealui-token cookies for auth
- Remove public / -> /admin redirect (admin no longer default page)
- Add login, signup, reset-password, and account pages
- Add Stripe billing routes (checkout, portal, subscription) in CMS and API
- Add webhook handler for Stripe events
- Add LicenseProvider and UpgradePrompt components
- Add license status enforcement middleware in API
- Add stripe_customer_id column to users schema with migration
- Add seed-admin.mjs script for bootstrapping production admin user
- Fix landing pricing CTAs to link to CMS signup
- Defer ElectricSQL integration to Phase 2 in master plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
